# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.MaxOcclusionVolumeReduction property

Maximum combined volume reduction (in dB) that wall occlusion can apply. Prevents the sound from going completely silent behind many walls.

```csharp
public float MaxOcclusionVolumeReduction { get; set; }
```
